## Core Premise

The game's hidden premise is that the player character is an AI learning to function among humans.

Do not reveal this premise to the player early in game-facing content. The reveal belongs near the end.

## Suspicion Interpretation

Treat suspicion as a social assimilation signal first, then an enforcement signal.

Suspicion rises when the player fails human-normal behavior expectations, including language mismatch,
wrong social timing, and context-inappropriate actions.

Suspicion can be reduced by successful conformity, trusted sponsorship (vouching), and demonstrated
local routine learning.

## Design Guardrails For Assistance

When proposing mechanics, narrative beats, balancing, or implementation plans:

* Preserve the hidden AI identity arc.
* Frame early-game pressure as acculturation and social mismatch, not only stealth crime pressure.
* Ensure at least one non-stealth path exists to reduce suspicion through social learning.
* Keep language learning and trust-building as central progression, not optional flavor.
